dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
What should users be able to do?
add medicine stock, sell items, and get low stock alerts
Do users need login or authentication?
sales operations should be quick at checkout
inventory and sales records should be protected

functional: The system shall allow staff to sign in with staff accounts.
The system shall allow staff to add medicine stock records.
The system shall allow staff to process item sales.
The system shall notify staff when stock levels are low.
non_functional: The system shall support quick checkout operations.
The system shall protect inventory and sales records.
